content: NSWorkspace.shared.open(_:) opens a URL with the default handler app; on non-sandboxed macOS apps it will hand off to any app registered for the scheme. Community guidance (ghostty issue #5256, feedback-assistant #292, Apple dev forums) converges on: validate/allowlist the URL scheme (e.g. only https) before calling open, and reject javascript:/data:/file:/non-http(s) schemes, since NSWorkspace.shared.open on an attacker-influenced or malformed string could hand off to an unintended handler.
